summary: Session 1 of 2 implemented the local-only push-gate signal for remote-less repositories. Added .dabbler/local-only marker detection via is_local_only(), added conservative remote detection so the waiver only fires after an affirmative no-remotes result, branched check_pushed_to_remote to pass with an audit note only for marker-present remote-less repos, and added focused pytest coverage for the helper and behavior matrix. Focused gate tests passed 31/31, and cross-provider verification returned VERIFIED after the Minor about _has_remote failure semantics was addressed.

reason.specifics: Routed analysis recommended switching away from Anthropic for Session 2 after the Claude close-out chat hit an Anthropic API error; Session 2 is routine CLI, documentation, metadata, and release-check work that an OpenAI-backed Copilot handoff can handle at low effort.

blockers: Anthropic/Claude API error interrupted Session 1 close-out, so keeping Session 2 on the same provider risks another handoff interruption.
